title: lotononis carnosa subsp. condensata
intro: Lotononis carnosa subsp. condensata is a plant species within the Fabaceae family, commonly known as the "bushwillow". This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Lotononis carnosa subsp. condensata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion for medicinal use, and sometimes also made into a paste or poultice for topical application.
